entity.summary: South American centralized cryptocurrency exchange serving local-currency markets in Chile, Colombia, and Peru, with consumer trading, professional trading, OTC, and API access.
entity.notes: Current first-party Buda.com website exposes local-currency crypto buying and selling, country-specific markets, BudaPRO professional trading, OTC services, mobile applications, and API documentation. Launch date remains null because this review did not reconstruct a precise day-level first-party launch marker.

evidence.title: Buda.com official exchange website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website exposes active crypto buying and selling, Chile/Colombia/Peru market access, BudaPRO, OTC, account login, and mobile applications.

evidence.title: Buda API documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party API documentation surface supports the exchange identity and programmatic market access.

evidence.title: Buda exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange candidate corpus independently identifies Buda as a centralized exchange venue and corroborates the current first-party exchange identity.
